description_long: A rectangular wooden serving board holds five pieces of sushi, each featuring a layer of pinkish-orange fish, likely salmon, atop a compact block of white rice wrapped with a thin strip of seaweed. The sushi pieces are neatly arranged in two rows, accompanied by a pair of brown wooden chopsticks resting parallel to the board. A small, round dish, likely for soy sauce, is placed near the sushi, adding to the presentation. The board has a smooth, polished finish with visible wood grain patterns. The overall arrangement is clean and visually appealing, evoking a traditional Japanese dining experience.
description: A wooden board with five pieces of salmon nigiri sushi, a pair of chopsticks, and a small round dish, all neatly arranged for serving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sushi pieces, chopsticks, and small dish on a wooden board, with the sushi and chopsticks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ends of the sushi pieces and the full length of the chopsticks, with the dish partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the sushi pieces, the chopsticks, and the dish on the opposite side of the board.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the chopsticks in the foreground and the sushi pieces and dish further back on the board.
